title: Medical Equipment/Assistive Technology Donation Programs - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Volunteering & Donating > Medical Equipment/Assistive Technology Donation Programs 10 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - No Filter Blindness Diabetes Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF A CARING CLOSET DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides gently used durable medical equipment (DME). May include hospital beds, shower chairs, bath benches, knee scooters, wheelchairs, walkers, adult briefs and incontinence products, canes, crutches, and other items depending on donations received. 7500 NE 16th Avenue Suite 1C Vancouver, WA 98665 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 10am-1pm, 1st Saturday of the month 10am-1pm Email (360) 258-0039 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ACCESS DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers gently used medical equipment such as walkers, wheelchairs, commodes, crutches, and shower chairs. Accepts donations of new or clean, used medical equipment in good working condition. 3630 Aviation Way Medford, OR 97504 Eligibility: Unrestricted. Individuals will have to sign a liability waiver. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (541) 690-3972 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CLEARVIEW DISABILITY RESOURCE CENTER MEDICAL EQUIPMENT LOANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides gently used medical equipment, such as walkers, canes, wheelchairs, bath seats and more. Accepts donations of clean and functional equipment. Does not accept items such as lift chairs, knee or back braces, orthopedic boots, medical beds, CPAP's or nebulizers. 1114 SW Frazer Avenue Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4pm Email (541) 276-1130 Get Directions Visit Website More Details HULL FOUNDATION AND LEARNING CENTER ORAL HULL FOUNDATION FOR THE BLIND Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers low vision equipment, classes, workshops, and activities including retreats and overnight getaways. Also provides care team training for those who work with people with vision loss and presentations for caregivers and organizations. 43233 SE Oral Hull Road Sandy, OR 97055 Eligibility: Adults with sight loss and their family members or caregivers Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (503) 668-6195 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LIVING WATER FELLOWSHIP MANY HANDS MEDICAL EQUIPMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides gently used medical equipment, such as walkers, lift chairs, and bath benches. Offers incontinence supplies and wound dressing when available. Delivery can be arranged. Accepts donations of functional equipment, will not take rusty, dirty, or broken items. 1000 N Main Avenue Suite 12 Tillamook, OR 97141 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Wednesday 1pm-2:30pm. Located at Tillamook Christian Center 701 Marolf Loop Road Tillamook, OR 97141. Email (503) 812-8889 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LOVE INC OF CLACKAMAS COUNTY GAP RESOURCES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides furniture, kitchen items, firewood, medical equipment, personal hygiene supplies, cleaning supplies, and bedding/linens. Accepts donations of similar items. Assistance depends on availability. Follow-ups may be provided once the need is met. Eligibility: Low-income households (self-declared or referred and verified by caseworker, employer, or landlord) Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-1pm Email (503) 650-0153 Get Directions Visit Website More Details MUTUAL AID DIABETES MUTUAL AID Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with acquiring insulin or diabetes supplies (injection supplies, home glucose monitoring systems, etc.), obtaining or renewing prescriptions, accessing health insurance or resolving issues with health insurance companies, peer support, and navigating diabetes resources. May provide limited financial assistance with copays and telehealth appointments to obtain prescriptions. Also accepts donations of diabetic supplies by connecting people with extra supplies to those in need in their area. Website Eligibility: Individuals affected by diabetes Hours: Not applicable Email (646) 780-9571 Visit Website More Details SOUTH LINCOLN RESOURCES APPLIANCES, FURNITURE, AND DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides previously used durable medical equipment, such as hospital beds, wheelchairs, walkers, crutches, canes, commodes, and toilet risers, as well as furniture and appliances. Donations are accepted. 3710 Crestline Drive Waldport, OR 97394 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: January-October: Tuesday noon-2pm or by appointment November-December: By appointment only Email (541) 563-3710 Get Directions Visit Website More Details SPECIAL EVENTS CLACKAMAS COUNTY CLACKAMAS COUNTY EVENT CENTER TIME TO SHRED IT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Bring up to four “banker” boxes or six brown paper grocery bags filled with paper to be shredded. The event will also dispose of old prescriptions and will be recycling old eye glasses, hearing aids, and cell phones. Hard drive wiping services will be available for $5 per device. 694 NE 4th Avenue Canby, OR 97013 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday, March 10, 2026 10am-2pm Email (503) 266-1136 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ST JOHN'S MEDICAL LOAN CLOSET MEDICAL EQUIPMENT LOANS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Lends durable medical equipment on a short-term basis, typically no longer than 3 months. Inventory includes wheelchairs, walkers, knee scooters, crutches, canes, toilet risers and commodes, shower stools, and transfer benches. Accepts donations of similar durable medical equipment. 795 Franklin Avenue SW Bandon, OR 97411 Eligibility: Unrestricted, but focus is on serving individuals recovering from surgery or an accident, those in hospice care, and those waiting for purchase authorization from their insurance carrier Hours: No standard hours Email (541) 590-2443 Get Directions Visit Website More Details ACCESS DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT PROGRAM CLEARVIEW DISABILITY RESOURCE CENTER MEDICAL EQUIPMENT LOANS HULL FOUNDATION AND LEARNING CENTER ORAL HULL FOUNDATION FOR THE BLIND LIVING WATER FELLOWSHIP MANY HANDS MEDICAL EQUIPMENT SOUTH LINCOLN RESOURCES APPLIANCES, FURNITURE, AND DURABLE MEDICAL EQUIPMENT SPECIAL EVENTS CLACKAMAS COUNTY TIME TO SHRED IT ST JOHN'S MEDICAL LOAN CLOSET MEDICAL EQUIPMENT LOANS
